result.reply:
Maine dekha ki aapko lag raha hai ki hum bas "retry" kar dein, but system level pe, jab koi tool fail hota hai, toh uske peeche koi technical reason hota hai.

Pehle attempt mein, `improvement_propose` tool ne fail kiya kyunki usse ek `task_id` chahiye tha, jo mere paas nahi tha. Aur jab aapne "retry" kaha, toh system ne ek alag tool call try kiya jo valid nahi tha.

**Meri reasoning yeh hai:** Aapka proposal—**Dynamic Contextual Weighting Module**—bahut advanced aur system-level improvement hai. Yeh bilkul sahi direction hai, kyunki yeh mere context handling ko *suggestion* banata hai, *dictate* nahi.

Lekin, `improvement_propose` tool ko sahi tarah se submit karne ke liye, mujhe ya toh woh `task_id` chahiye, ya phir humein is proposal ko kisi aur tareeke se submit karna hoga jo context-free ho.

**Kya hum yeh kar sakte hain:**

1.  **Option A (Technical Fix):** Agar aapke paas koi specific `task_id` hai jisse yeh proposal link karna hai, toh woh bataiye.
2.  **Option B (Direct Submission):** Agar `task_id` zaroori nahi hai, toh main aapke poore proposal ko ek detailed text block mein convert karke, use **system knowledge base** mein ek high-priority suggestion ke taur par *write* kar sakti hoon, jisse woh review queue mein chala jaaye.

Aap kya chahte hain? Kya main Option B (Direct Submission) se proceed karun? ✨
